overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic dystopian game (Cyberpunk 2077), walking through a waterfront encampment at dusk. The player moves from a covered rooftop shelter area with makeshift tents, past palm-lined promenades with temporary dwellings, down to a beach with views of a neon-lit city skyline across the bay.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered rooftop encampment with tents and furniture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the covered encampment area under the large canopy

entered.detail: large umbrella structure with yellow and red panels providing partial cover
blue plastic barrel with glowing neon rectangular sign attached
dark wooden pallet table with bottles and items on top
dark upholstered sofa sitting outdoors in the encampment
cluster of temporary shelters, tarps, and camping tents

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under a large yellow and red canopy on a rooftop encampment. The area contains makeshift shelters, a worn couch, wooden tables, and various scattered items. The camera moves forward through this semi-covered shelter area with paved tile flooring.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and temporary shelters

events.description: exits covered canopy area into open-air palm tree lined promenade

agents.ego_description: walking along the open promenade past rows of tents and trash bag piles

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the right side of the walkway
large illuminated amusement park wheel visible in the distance
clusters of blue and black garbage bags stacked along the path
tall vertical searchlight beam shining into the cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the scene opens into a wide palm-tree-lined promenade with overcast skies. The path is lined with piles of blue trash bags and makeshift tents. In the distance, a Ferris wheel and a distinctive vertical beam of light are visible against the futuristic city skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: promenade approach to beach access stairs with food vendors

events.description: slight left turn as approaching the stairway descent to beach level

agents.ego_description: approaching the stairway down to the beach, navigating around obstacles

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking down the stairs ahead of the player

entered.detail: small vendor cart with yellow umbrella and equipment
wide concrete stairway leading down to the beach level
sandy beach area visible at the bottom of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the end of the promenade where concrete stairs lead down to the beach. A yellow food cart sits to the right, and a few NPCs are visible ahead. The palm trees now line the left side as the camera angles toward the stairway descent.

scene_state.functional_zone: beach access stairway with waterfront and city skyline views

events.description: begins descending concrete stairs from promenade to beach level
view opens to waterfront revealing sunset reflection on ocean water

agents.ego_description: walking down the stairs toward the beach, observing the waterfront and distant city skyline

notable_agents.action: child in red shirt descending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: calm sea with golden sunset reflection and distant structures
futuristic skyscrapers and buildings across the bay with lights
stainless steel handrail along the left side of the stairs
elevated concrete walkway structure passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The player descends the concrete stairs toward the beach, passing under an overpass structure. The view opens to reveal the ocean with sunset reflections and a distant futuristic skyline across the water. Metal railings line the stairway as the beach and sand become prominent below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cluttered rooftop shelter toward a wide, sunset-lit coastal vista. It begins under a large yellow and red canopy, moving past makeshift tents and worn furniture across a paved rooftop. As the camera exits the covered area, the scene opens into a wide promenade lined with palm trees and piles of blue trash bags, revealing a distant futuristic skyline with a Ferris wheel and a vertical beam of light. The path then leads toward a yellow food cart and a set of concrete stairs, where the camera angles downward past a few NPCs. Finally, the view expands as the camera descends the stairs under an overpass, transitioning from the urban encampment to a sandy beach with the ocean and a neon city skyline reflecting the colors of the sunset.
